profile.name: Swaraj Shaw
profile.summary: Machine Learning Engineer with 5+ years of experience delivering NLP, Speech (TTS/ASR), and LLM-based systems across Big Tech and startups. Expert in text-to-speech modelling, embeddings, ONNX inference, and production AI pipelines.
profile.status: Open to opportunities · Stamp 4 · No sponsorship needed

education.details: Focused on advanced ML, Deep Learning, and AI ethics.

highlights: SME for Hindi TTS: phoneset design, G2P mappings, TN rules, and full linguistic pipeline.
Built a 14k+ sentence evaluation suite across 11 linguistic categories.
Corrected 14k+ phonetic errors in a 35k-word lexicon database using Python tooling.
Major contributor to Ray-Ban Meta smart glasses Hindi TTS.
Built conversational chatbots (Amazon Lex + Connect) across Slack and Messenger.
Delivered a recommendation engine via Amazon Personalize, increasing conversions by 15%.
Built anomaly detection pipelines for energy data; reduced operational wastage by 15%.
Built credit-risk and churn models using SMOTE + XGBoost.
Prototyped ASR-based booking and customer support workflows.

projects.name: AutoHub Ireland
projects.desc: Irish vehicle intelligence platform: real-time fuel & EV price map, best-value routing, RSA driving test scraper, and an AI Master Mechanic assistant with RAG.

projects.name: DataDrive.ai · Nexus Platform
projects.desc: Enterprise AI orchestration monorepo: FastAPI gateway, GPT-4o teacher to local GGUF distillation, and PII-redaction-aware ETL.

projects.name: Sorted
projects.desc: Local-first AI file intelligence desktop app. Rust daemon with GPU-accelerated ONNX inference for semantic file organisation.

projects.name: AccessLM
projects.desc: Run Llama 3, Mistral, and Phi-3 on any laptop using libp2p DHT to split model layers across peers.

projects.name: Record Genie
projects.desc: Agentic AI music assistant built for DkIT LLM course. Implements ReAct loop and Workflow patterns with Pydantic tool-calling.

faqs.a: Swaraj has an **MSc in Artificial Intelligence** (1.1 Honours) from Dublin Business School (2023) and a **B.Tech in Computer Science & Engineering** from Amity University (2019).
You can reach Swaraj via email at **shaw.swaraj16@gmail.com** or on LinkedIn at **linkedin.com/in/swarajs**. He is based in Dublin, Ireland.
Swaraj is currently **Open to opportunities** and holds a **Stamp 4** visa in Ireland, meaning he requires no sponsorship.

Swaraj has extensive experience with LLMs, including building **AccessLM** (P2P decentralised AI), **DataDrive.ai** (enterprise orchestration), and **Record Genie** (agentic music assistant). He's also currently pursuing an LLM Agentic AI course at DkIT.
